description: multi-level inheritance instead of a concern/mixin for shared behaviour
input:
class BaseAccount < ApplicationRecord
  def self.table_name = "accounts"
end

class SubscribedAccount < BaseAccount
  def billable? = true
end

class TrialAccount < SubscribedAccount
  def trial? = true
end

class ExpiredAccount < TrialAccount
  def expired? = true
end
